description:
You are a physician using FreeMED EMR (http://localhost/freemed/, login: admin / admin). Document a follow-up visit for patient Maria Santos regarding her hypertension management by adding a SOAP-format progress note to her medical record with the following content:

Date of Note: Today's date
Description/Summary: Hypertension follow-up

Subjective (S): Patient reports occasional morning dizziness over the past two weeks. Denies chest pain, shortness of breath, or palpitations. States she has been compliant with Lisinopril 10mg daily. Reports reducing sodium intake as previously advised.

Objective (O): BP 138/88 mmHg, HR 72 bpm, Weight 165 lbs. Alert and oriented x3. Heart regular rate and rhythm, no murmurs or gallops. Lungs clear to auscultation bilaterally. No peripheral edema.

Assessment (A): Essential hypertension, improving but not yet at goal BP below 130/80. Morning dizziness likely orthostatic, related to antihypertensive therapy. Current medication regimen adequate.

Plan (P): Continue Lisinopril 10mg daily. If BP remains above 130/80 at next visit, increase to 20mg daily. Follow up in 4 weeks. Continue low-sodium diet and home BP monitoring. Patient advised to rise slowly from sitting or lying position to reduce dizziness.

Ensure the progress note is saved and associated with Maria Santos.
